title: entry format
text: entry format A definition in a syntax string that specifies the characters that the user is allowed to enter in a field. Related Links Field Syntax Codes Field syntax codes specify the data entry pattern, the allowed characters, and whether fields are mandatory or read-only. syntax string A string in ProcScript that is used for pattern matching. It comprises a group of characters and profile characters enclosed in single quotation marks that formally defines the format and contents of any other string of alphanumeric characters.
